allowableDeductions: damage beyond normal wear and tear
costs of cleaning if tenant left unit unreasonably dirty
penalties: Tenant may apply for dispute resolution through RTB if deposit is not returned on time.
notes: Landlord must return deposit within 15 days of tenant vacating.
An itemized statement of deductions is required if any amount is withheld.

citations.statute: Residential Tenancy Act, SBC 2002, c 78, s 38(1)
citations.excerpt: A landlord must return the security deposit to the tenant within 15 days after the tenant vacates.

notes: Placeholder values for calculator use. Verify with RTB.
